diagrams.title: Two-Phase Commit Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the complete flow of 2PC with Vote and Decision phases, including messages between coordinator and participants
diagrams.purpose: Understand sequential flow and message passing in 2PC

diagrams.title: Three-Phase Commit Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows three phases with decision paths and handling of coordinator failure at each stage
diagrams.purpose: Understand non-blocking nature and failure handling in 3PC

diagrams.title: 2PC Blocking Scenario
diagrams.description: Illustrates the blocking problem when coordinator fails after participants vote commit
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why blocking occurs and its consequences

visuals.title: Atomic Commit Protocols
visuals.description: Visual diagram for atomic commit protocols
